# Getting Sift Done at Money20/20 USA in Las Vegas

CEO Kris Nagel on this year’s Money20/20 USA and what it means to Get Sift Done.

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Kris Nagel

Oct 5, 2023

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

The Sift team is buzzing with excitement as we prepare to host industry-leading businesses at this year’s Money20/20 USA event in Las Vegas. Money20/20 is the biggest, most influential gathering of the global money ecosystem, bringing together more than 13,000 attendees and 3,000 leading companies to shake up the fintech world. It’s also an event I look forward to every year as an opportunity to discuss the latest technologies, strategies, and best practices in payments with some of the biggest names in fintech.

![Getting Sift Done](https://dev-sift.pantheonsite.io/app/uploads/2023/10/Getting-Sift-Done-M2020_Blog-1454x1044-2-edited.jpg)

So what can you expect when you visit our booth at Money20/20? We’re here to provide you with valuable insights, thought-provoking discussions, and expert guidance on navigating the ever-evolving world of digital payments and risk decisioning. Our team of experts is ready to listen to the unique and complex problems you’re facing and share strategies to help set your business up for success in today’s competitive landscape. 

We have a lineup of exciting activities in store, from daily booth activities to networking opportunities and exclusive evening events. These events will give you a unique chance to connect with Sift’s top executives and experts, who are leading the future of secure growth in the payments industry.

Mark your calendars, and stay tuned for more details on what Sift has in store for you at Money20/20 Las Vegas. We’re eager to meet you, share our vision, and explore together how we can redefine trust and safety for businesses like yours.

## Get Sift done at Money20/20

This year, our focus is sharper than ever. We’re on a mission to bring simplicity, speed, and scalability to the forefront of risk decisioning. Because in an increasingly competitive market, organizations that deliver easy, fast, and safe digital customer experiences will outperform those that don’t. This means we’re dedicated to helping businesses grow safely and profitably, now and into the future. 

We’ve recently shipped many exciting innovations across our product portfolio, expanded our global data network, and introduced strategic service offerings—all in a focused effort to serve customers like you with increasing value. 

I’m especially proud to share that Sift was recently named a Leader in the 2023 Forrester Wave™ for Digital Fraud Management report. The report cites Sift as a Leader in digital fraud management, with 5/5 ratings in the chargeback management, nonpayment fraud and policy abuse, and roadmap criteria.

At Money20/20, we’re looking forward to diving into these insights and showcasing what it means to #getsiftdone, especially when it comes to achieving secure growth in today’s dynamic landscape. 

## Don’t miss our session on how cybercriminals are exploiting your business’s KYC vulnerabilities

![Sift Promopack Money](https://dev-sift.pantheonsite.io/app/uploads/2023/10/Sift_Promopack_Money2020_KYC_Facebook-1200x630-1.jpg)

Our esteemed Trust and Safety Architect Brittany Allen will be hosting a session on how cybercriminals are exploiting your business’s KYC vulnerabilities. During her presentation, Brittany will cover why it’s critical to provide consumers with frictionless online experiences while also keeping fraudsters at bay. In today’s economy, businesses need to strike the perfect balance between low friction for legitimate customers and protecting against fraud. Don’t miss her session on Sunday, October 22 at 2:20 p.m. to learn how to strengthen fraud strategies without sacrificing the customer experience.

#### Attend our exclusive Money20/20 activities and meet the Sift team

We’ve got a stellar lineup of activities throughout Money20/20, and no shortage of opportunities to meet the Sift executive team, including myself. Check out the roster of events and activities we have lined up for the conference:

#### Money20/20 kickoff reception

Kickstart Money20/20 with an exclusive reception at our hospitality lounge on Sunday, October 22 from 6 to 10 p.m. Enjoy delicious drinks, bites, and live music while connecting with other industry experts and leaders.

#### Meet us at booth #4208

Our team will be on the floor ready to chat Monday through Wednesday, October 23–25! Pre-book a meeting or catch a live demo for a firsthand look at how our solutions can revolutionize your fraud management. Stop by our theater experiences every hour in the Sift booth, showcasing our latest product innovations in between fraud-focused trivia games—complete with a prize wheel for trivia champions to spin and win. 

#### Rosina Cocktail Lounge happy hour co-hosted by Incode and TTEC

Unwind and socialize with fellow conference attendees over drinks at the renowned Rosina Cocktail Lounge on Monday, October 23 from 8:30–11:30 p.m. We’ve curated a selection of beverages to suit all tastes.

#### Topgolf social co-hosted with Spec

Whether you’re a seasoned golfer or a first-timer, Topgolf offers an inclusive experience to network in a more casual setting with a range of delicious beverages and hearty appetizers. Join us on Tuesday, October 24 from 7:30 to 9:30 p.m. Transportation will be provided via a looping shuttle from the Venetian so you can enjoy the night!

**If you’re interested in joining us at these events or scheduling a demo with our team,** **register here.**
